notes: The four historical case corpora are frozen as the v1 working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. Wholesale redownload, starter-corpus replacement, and source expansion are out of scope for the annotation-forward reprocess unless a specific source defect is found. Lincoln has a reviewed MIPVU pilot sample, defined reliability workflow, provisional CMT mappings, corpus-assisted/diachronic outputs, interpretive analysis layers, historical-alignment notes, and draft support synthesis. The x-case layer has a comparative protocol and moral-equivalence guardrails. Full-corpus MIPVU review, reliability adjudication, comparator case support ratings, and promotion of public findings remain before v1.
